summary: Created 118 supplementary unit tests for dast_engine.py covering all uncovered async scan methods (lines 270, 298, 318-353, 376-406, 411-448, 453-483, 486-515, 520-545, 550-582, 587-623), lifting combined coverage from 47.80% to 100.00%.
issues: AsyncMock.side_effect with sync functions did not work as expected for _check_info_disclosure tests — fixed by using async coroutine functions directly assigned to mock_client.get.
Info disclosure 'body > 50 chars' guard caused 4 tests to fail initially — fixed by ensuring all test bodies exceed 50 characters.
